definitions.text: Of or relating to the mind or specifically the total emotional and intellectual response of an individual to external reality. Occurring or experienced in the mind.
Occurring or experienced in the mind.
Relating to the mind, its activity, or its products as an object of study.
State of mind; ellipsis of mental state.
examples: y'all need to fix your mentals

definitions.text: Of or relating to the chin or median part of the lower jaw, genial.
examples: the mental nerve, the mental region

definitions.text: Of or relating to the chinlike or liplike structure.
A plate or scale covering the mentum or chin of a fish or reptile.
